---
title: "muninn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\muninn.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.32
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 8.46
overall_score: 5.69
---

## Intent
The `muninn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on Muninn, __init__, run_cycle. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Muninn, __init__, run_cycle. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 264 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_hunter](file://src.sentinel.muninn_hunter)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_crucible](file://src.sentinel.muninn_crucible)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [traceback](file://traceback)

### Exports
- `Muninn`
- `__init__`
- `run_cycle`
